title: test_user_registration suite failing — email validation rejects valid addresses
description: The user registration test suite is failing because the email validation regex rejects valid email addresses that contain a '+' character (e.g., user+tag@example.com). Several users have reported they cannot register with their Gmail plus-addressing emails.
steps_to_reproduce: Observe test 'should accept valid email with plus addressing' fails
Try registering with email 'user+test@gmail.com' via the API
error_log:
FAIL tests/auth.test.js
  User Registration
    ✓ should register user with valid data (45ms)
    ✗ should accept valid email with plus addressing (12ms)
      Expected: 201
      Received: 400
    ✓ should reject registration without password (8ms)
    ✗ should accept valid email with dots (10ms)
      Expected: 201
      Received: 400
expected_behavior: Email validation accepts all RFC 5322 compliant email addresses including those with + and multiple dots
actual_behavior: Email regex is too restrictive, rejecting valid emails with + characters and consecutive dots
recent_changes: Custom email validation was added to replace express-validator's built-in isEmail()
